job_description:
# Data Analyst II SQL, Excel, SFTP
Company: Centene Corporation
Source: Official company careers
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 30, 2026
Posted: April 24, 2026
URL: https://jobs.centene.com/us/en/jobs/1634956/data-analyst-ii-sql-excel-sftp/

## Highlights
- Healthcare analytics role in Centene's Data & Business Analytics function.
- Remote available, with official location listed as Woodland Hills, CA.
- Responsibilities include analyzing integrated healthcare provider, member/patient, and third-party data, supporting large-scale projects, root-cause analysis of data irregularities, process enhancements, automation, and stakeholder communication.
- Requires SQL/query languages, Excel, large databases, data verification, data management, and preferred BI tools/Python/R.
strengths: Strong healthcare analytics, SQL, Excel, data verification, data management, and stakeholder communication match.
Official company careers page with visible posting date and Apply Now link.
Data irregularity/root-cause and process enhancement language maps well to data quality and validation experience.
gaps: SFTP and Python/R are preferred/visible requirements; do not overstate if not supported by the base resume.
Location is listed as Woodland Hills, CA even though the posting says Remote Available; confirm remote eligibility before applying.
notes: Apply first. Tailor toward healthcare analytics, SQL, Excel, data verification, root-cause analysis, reporting reliability, and stakeholder-facing insights.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Healthcare Data Analyst | SQL & Excel Reporting | Data Verification
